displayTitle: Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago #1
synopsis: This is the first of a six-volume series that collects black & white reprints of the Marvel STAR WARS comics from the early '80s. The first volume of the series features issues #91, King-size Annual #1, and Annual #3. Also with brand-new cover art by Brian Stelfreeze.
title: Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago #1
